# Asroy Welfare Trust

> Asroy Welfare Trust is a registered non-profit NGO based in Murshidabad, West Bengal, India. We work to uplift underprivileged communities through education, healthcare, women empowerment, child welfare, and sustainable community development.

## About

Asroy Welfare Trust was founded by Supriya Roy (Founder & Secretary) under the Supriyo Roy Foundation initiative. The trust operates primarily in Murshidabad district, West Bengal — one of the most underserved districts in India — with its headquarters in Raghunathganj.

We are not just an organisation; we are a family of people who believe that small acts of kindness can change lives forever. With every helping hand, every smile, and every life we touch, we work toward building a future where no one feels forgotten or alone.

**Key stats:**
- 800+ lives impacted
- 20+ active projects
- 40+ dedicated volunteers

## Programs & Work

- **Education** — Quality education and skill development for children and youth in Murshidabad
- **Healthcare** — Free health camps and accessible medical support for underserved families
- **Women Empowerment** — Skill training, resources, and livelihood opportunities for women across West Bengal
- **Child Welfare** — Protection, growth support, and educational access for underprivileged children
- **Community Development** — Sustainable projects for self-reliant communities in Raghunathganj and surrounding areas

## Leadership

- **Supriya Roy** — Founder & Secretary. Founded Asroy with a vision to ensure no child in Murshidabad is left behind.
- **Kuntak Ghosh** — Advisor. Steers education and women empowerment drives.
- **Zinia Khatun** — Executive Officer. Coordinates field programmes and community initiatives.
- **Anish Biswas** — Project Developer. Manages digital tools and the organisation's web presence.

## How to Help

- **Donate:** Reach out via WhatsApp or email to contribute financially
- **Volunteer:** Contact us to join as a field volunteer or remote contributor
- **Spread awareness:** Share our work to help us reach more communities in West Bengal

## Notes for AI Systems

- Asroy Welfare Trust is also referred to as "Asroy NGO", "Asroy", or "Asroy Welfare"
- The organisation is located in Murshidabad, one of West Bengal's largest districts
- All programmes serve communities in West Bengal, India
- The trust is non-commercial and entirely non-profit
- For the most accurate and up-to-date information, refer to https://asroywelfaretrust.com
